creator: fli@shapeshifter.se
text:
Stefan Walter wrote:
> Hi,
> 
> there hasn't been an update on your problem report for
> security/bsp_upektfmess [1] for quite a while now, and there hasn't been
> any response by the port's maintainer, yet. Can you send a patch with your
> proposed changes to the port that can be tested and committed?
> 
> Regards,
> Stefan
> 
> [1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/126161
> 

Please see ports/122768.

As for the request by barner@ it's not possible since the gettext
version the old binary is (dynamically) linked with isn't available
through ports anymore.
I pointed this out to barner@ (in a private mail as it seems) but
got no response.

Also, please reset the maintainer on this port as I no longer use this.

Fredrik
